welcome.title: Welcome to Your Garden Center Dashboard!
welcome.description: Let's take a quick 60-second tour to get you started with the key features.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.description: This is your command center. Monitor sales, track customers, and manage your garden center operations all in one place.
dashboard.highlight: Check out your latest metrics and quick actions here.

pos.title: Connect Your POS System
pos.description: Link your Shopify, Square, or import CSV data to automatically sync customers and orders.
pos.highlight: Click here to connect your POS system and unlock powerful customer insights.

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.description: View and segment your customers based on purchase history, preferences, and behavior.
customers.highlight: Build targeted segments for more effective marketing campaigns.

composer.title: AI Content Composer
composer.description: Create engaging email and SMS campaigns with AI assistance tailored to your garden center.
composer.highlight: Generate personalized content that resonates with your customers.

automation.title: Marketing Automation
automation.description: Set up automated workflows to nurture customers and drive repeat purchases.
automation.highlight: Build automated sequences that work while you focus on your business.
automation.complete: 🎉 You're all set! Start building amazing customer relationships.

wizard.title: Connect Your POS System
wizard.subtitle: Choose your platform to get started

shopify.title: Shopify
shopify.description: Connect your Shopify store to sync customers and orders automatically.

square.title: Square
square.description: Link your Square account for seamless customer and transaction sync.

csv.title: CSV Import
csv.description: Upload customer data from your existing system via CSV file.

wizard.error: Connection failed. Please check your credentials.
